title: euphrasia pectinata var. obtusiserrata
intro: Euphrasia pectinata var. obtusiserrata is a rare alpine plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds, which have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving eye health, as well as acting as an antiseptic and expectorant. Euphrasia pectinata var. obtusiserrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
